description: Scope-guard for the v0.15.5 D-R-001 fix. A vendor-template directory `Templates1/Larkon-*` (the canonical Round-4 D-C-001 dogfood-target naming) carries a hardcoded JWT in demo code. The narrower pattern 'Templates[0-9]*' must still match this directory and skip it via DEFAULT_IGNORE — preserving the original D-C-001 vendor-template-noise close. If this fixture flips to FAIL post-hotfix, the new pattern broke the v0.15.4 vendor-dir intent and the fix is rejected.
